headline: bar tip credit refund Preparation Checklist — Scottsdale
articleBody:
bar tip credit refund Preparation Checklist for Scottsdale Clients

Before your bar tip credit refund appointment with FICA Tax Credits & Refunds, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact FICA Tax Credits & Refunds at (213) 537-5613 to get started.
